summary: Comprehensive testing of OPR Army Forge application completed successfully. All core features working properly including game selection, army building, unit customization, validation, and export functionality.

design_issues.issue: Export buttons should show proper disabled state feedback when army is empty

passed_tests: Backend API health endpoints (root, health check)
Games API endpoints (get all games, get by ID, 404 handling)
Factions API endpoints (get all, filter by game, get by ID)
Army validation API (valid armies, hero limits, 35% rule)
Army CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Game selection cards display and clickability
Continue button appears after game selection
Faction dropdown loads and selects factions
Unit browser displays heroes and units correctly
Unit cards display in roster with proper stats
Unit search and filtering (all, heroes, units)
Proper redirect when accessing builder without game selection

success_percentage.frontend: 98% (25/26 features working, 1 minor UI improvement needed)
